case_title: CACH, LLC VS. CURTIS MC CLAIN et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MC CLAIN, CURTIS DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-16-2012
DECLARATION FOR REDUCTION OF FILING FEE PURSUANT CALIFORNIA BUSINESS AND PROFESSIONS CODE 6322.1(C)(1) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC SERVED FEB-28-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MC CLAIN, CURTIS
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MC CLAIN, CURTIS
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MC CLAIN, CURTIS
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MC CLAIN, CURTIS
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-07-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT MC CLAIN, CURTIS
DECLARATION REGARDING CONTRACT COPY IN LIEU OF ORIGINAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MC CLAIN, CURTIS $1,836.01 PRINCIPAL, $467.81 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,303.82, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-07-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: VOS, RYAN E. SUBSTITUTED FOR SIPES, MICHAEL K AS ATTORNEY FOR CACH, LLC
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MC CLAIN, CURTIS
